docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,010.00 FILED BY DAVIS, MARISA AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: AFTER THE THIRD AND LAST ATTEMPT, THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, MARISA AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, JOSE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-21-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF MARISA DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE VELASQUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, MARISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, JOSE $2,010.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
